history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with short dark hair, wearing a pink camouflage patterned jacket with shark teeth detail on the collar and a white baseball cap, is posing with their hand on the cap. They are wearing glasses and a necklace. The background is lit with purple and pink neon lights. To the right, a large, illuminated jack-o'-lantern is visible, along with a spider decoration and a bottle of what appears to be incense. On a shelf to the left, there are bottles with labels, one reading "caramel macchiato," and prices like "65K" and "60K." Small orange pumpkin decorations are scattered on the counter. The overall mood is cool, trendy, and slightly festive, with a strong emphasis on vibrant, artificial lighting. The style is reminiscent of a social media aesthetic, possibly a TikTok or Instagram post.
